timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Peter is traditionally recognized as leader in Rome
description: Catholic tradition identifies Saint Peter as the first bishop of Rome, grounding later papal claims to apostolic succession.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Peter is martyred in Rome
description: Peter’s death in Rome became central to the spiritual authority associated with the Roman see.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Edict of Milan legalizes Christianity
description: Imperial toleration of Christianity transformed the setting in which the bishops of Rome operated.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Nicene Christianity becomes imperial religion
description: The Edict of Thessalonica strengthened the institutional position of the Christian church within the Roman world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Leo I becomes pope
description: Pope Leo I helped define papal primacy and became one of the most influential bishops of Rome in late antiquity.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Gregory I begins his pontificate
description: Gregory the Great expanded papal administration, missionary activity, and the prestige of the Roman see.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Charlemagne is crowned emperor
description: Pope Leo III crowned Charlemagne in Rome, symbolizing the papacy’s political role in medieval Europe.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: The Great Schism divides eastern and western churches
description: Mutual excommunications between Rome and Constantinople marked the formal breach between the Roman Catholic and Eastern Orthodox churches.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Gregory VII is elected pope
description: Gregory VII launched reforms that asserted papal independence and intensified the Investiture Controversy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Urban II calls the First Crusade
description: At Clermont, Urban II urged western Christians to take up arms in the eastern Mediterranean, linking crusading to papal leadership.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Papacy moves to Avignon
description: The relocation of the papal court to Avignon began a prolonged period of residence outside Rome.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Western Schism begins
description: Rival papal claimants in Rome and Avignon fractured the Latin church and weakened papal authority.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Martin V is elected and ends the schism
description: The Council of Constance restored a single recognized pope by electing Martin V.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Luther’s challenge begins the Reformation crisis
description: Martin Luther’s Ninety-five Theses triggered a religious upheaval that profoundly altered papal power in Europe.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Council of Trent opens
description: The council became the central Catholic response to the Reformation and reshaped doctrine, discipline, and church governance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Rome is annexed and the Papal States end
description: Italian forces entered Rome during unification, ending papal temporal rule over the Papal States.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Lateran Treaty creates Vatican City
description: The Lateran Treaty resolved the Roman Question and recognized Vatican City as a sovereign state.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: John XXIII announces the Second Vatican Council
description: The pope called an ecumenical council to renew church life and engage more directly with the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Second Vatican Council opens
description: Vatican II began its first session and would bring major liturgical and institutional reforms to the Catholic Church.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: John Paul II is elected pope
description: Karol Wojtyła became the first non-Italian pope in 455 years, broadening the church’s global identity.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Benedict XVI resigns
description: Benedict XVI became the first pope in centuries to resign voluntarily, citing age and health.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Francis is elected pope
description: Jorge Mario Bergoglio became the first pope from the Americas and the first Jesuit pope.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Papacy and the Vatican
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the papacy and Vatican City, from early Christian Rome to the modern Holy See.
title: Leo XIV is elected pope
description: Robert Francis Prevost became the first American pope and the 267th pope of the Catholic Church.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Early Maya farming villages emerge
description: Settled agricultural communities began to form in the Maya region, laying the foundations for later urban civilization.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Preclassic ceremonial centers expand
description: Monumental building and complex political organization spread across early Maya communities during the Preclassic era.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: El Mirador rises as a major center
description: Large-scale construction at El Mirador reflected the growing complexity of Preclassic Maya political life.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Classic Maya period begins
description: Archaeologists date the beginning of the Classic era to around this time, when dynastic inscriptions and urban florescence intensified.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Earliest known dated Maya stela is erected at Tikal
description: Stela 29 at Tikal carries one of the earliest surviving Long Count dates in the Maya world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Siyaj K’ak’ arrives at Tikal
description: The arrival of Siyaj K’ak’ marked a major political shift in Tikal and linked Maya dynastic history to central Mexico.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Tikal suffers major defeat
description: Tikal was defeated by rivals associated with Caracol and Calakmul, altering the regional balance of power.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Pakal the Great takes the throne of Palenque
description: K’inich Janaab’ Pakal began a long reign that made Palenque one of the best-known Classic Maya capitals.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Jasaw Chan K’awiil I becomes ruler of Tikal
description: His accession marked the recovery of Tikal as a dominant power in the late Classic period.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Tikal defeats Calakmul
description: Tikal’s victory over Calakmul reshaped elite politics across the southern lowlands.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Quiriguá defeats Copán’s ruler
description: The capture and execution of Copán’s king by Quiriguá signaled shifting alliances and weakening old powers.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Classic Maya collapse begins to accelerate
description: By the late eighth century, monument erection and courtly life started to contract across many Maya centers.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Last dated monument is erected at Copán
description: Copán’s final dated monument marked the decline of one of the Classic period’s leading royal centers.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Tikal’s last known dated monument is dedicated
description: The final dated inscription at Tikal symbolized the fading of Classic dynastic life in the central lowlands.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Toniná records one of the last Classic Maya dates
description: Late inscriptions such as those at Toniná show the final stages of Classic-era political tradition.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Chichén Itzá enters a new era of regional dominance
description: By the late tenth century, Chichén Itzá had become one of the most important Postclassic centers in northern Yucatán.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Mayapán falls after revolt
description: The destruction of Mayapán ended the last major political confederation in northern Yucatán before the Spanish conquest.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Spaniards reach the Yucatán coast
description: Francisco Hernández de Córdoba’s expedition marked sustained Spanish contact with Maya polities of Yucatán.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Spanish conquest of highland K’iche’ advances
description: Pedro de Alvarado’s campaign broke major Maya resistance in the Guatemalan highlands.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Mérida is founded over the Maya city of T’hó
description: The Spanish colonial city of Mérida was established atop an earlier Maya center in Yucatán.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Nojpetén falls to the Spanish
description: The conquest of Nojpetén ended the last independent Maya kingdom in the lowlands.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Caste War of Yucatán begins
description: A major Maya uprising challenged regional rule and reshaped politics in the Yucatán peninsula.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Maya Civilization
timeline_description: Major milestones in the rise, florescence, transformation, conquest, and modern legacy of Maya civilization.
title: Rigoberta Menchú wins the Nobel Peace Prize
description: The award drew global attention to Maya communities, Indigenous rights, and historical violence in Guatemala.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: White Star Line approves the Olympic-class liners
description: Plans moved forward for three giant passenger ships, including what would become Titanic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Titanic keel is laid
description: Construction of Titanic began at the Harland and Wolff shipyard in Belfast.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Titanic is launched
description: The hull of Titanic entered the water in a major public ceremony at Belfast.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Sea trials are completed
description: Titanic underwent trials before being cleared for passenger service.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Titanic departs Southampton
description: The liner began its maiden voyage to New York with passengers from several social classes aboard.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Titanic calls at Cherbourg
description: The ship anchored off Cherbourg to take on additional passengers and mail.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Titanic leaves Queenstown for the Atlantic crossing
description: After its final European stop, Titanic headed west across the North Atlantic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Iceberg warnings accumulate during the voyage
description: Multiple wireless messages warned of ice in Titanic’s path before the collision.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Titanic strikes an iceberg
description: Late on April 14, the ship hit an iceberg, opening multiple compartments to the sea.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Distress rockets and wireless calls are sent
description: As the ship flooded, crew members launched rockets and sent CQD and SOS distress messages.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Titanic sinks
description: The liner foundered in the early hours of April 15, causing one of the deadliest peacetime maritime disasters in history.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Carpathia rescues survivors
description: RMS Carpathia arrived at the disaster site and picked up survivors from Titanic’s lifeboats.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Carpathia reaches New York
description: Survivors arrived in New York, where public shock and intense press coverage followed.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: U.S. Senate inquiry opens
description: An American investigation began examining the causes of the disaster and failures in maritime safety.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: British Wreck Commissioner’s inquiry begins
description: A formal British investigation reviewed navigation, lifeboats, communications, and safety procedures.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: First SOLAS convention is signed
description: The International Convention for the Safety of Life at Sea was adopted in response to lessons from Titanic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Wreck of Titanic is discovered
description: A joint American-French expedition located the wreck on the seabed of the North Atlantic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: First major salvage expedition recovers artifacts
description: Expeditions began bringing objects from the wreck to the surface, fueling debate over preservation and memorial ethics.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: James Cameron’s Titanic film is released
description: The blockbuster film renewed global fascination with the disaster and its human stories.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: Centenary commemorations mark 100 years since the sinking
description: Memorial events, exhibitions, and scholarship renewed public engagement with Titanic’s history.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Titanic Disaster and Legacy
timeline_description: Major milestones in the design, voyage, sinking, investigation, discovery, and cultural legacy of RMS Titanic.
title: High-resolution digital scan of the wreck is released
description: A detailed full-size scan provided new visual documentation of Titanic’s condition on the seabed.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Ancient canal link is attempted between the Nile and Red Sea
description: Middle Kingdom Egypt is associated with early efforts to connect the Nile basin to Red Sea trade routes.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Necho II begins a canal project
description: The Egyptian pharaoh Necho II is traditionally credited with reopening or starting a canal toward the Red Sea.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Darius I completes an ancient canal connection
description: The Persian king Darius I is associated with completing a navigable canal link used in antiquity.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Napoleon orders a survey for a modern canal
description: French interest in a direct Mediterranean–Red Sea waterway revived during Napoleon’s Egyptian campaign.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Ferdinand de Lesseps receives a concession
description: Said Pasha granted de Lesseps the authority to organize construction of a canal across the isthmus.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Suez Canal Company is formed
description: The Universal Company of the Maritime Canal of Suez was established to finance and construct the canal.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Construction of the modern canal begins
description: Excavation started on one of the largest engineering projects of the nineteenth century.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Suez Canal officially opens
description: The opening ceremony marked the completion of a direct sea route between the Mediterranean and Red Sea.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Britain buys Egypt’s canal shares
description: The British government purchased the khedive’s shares, strengthening British influence over the waterway.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: British occupation of Egypt begins
description: Britain’s occupation gave it decisive control over the canal’s strategic corridor.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Convention of Constantinople internationalizes canal passage
description: Major powers agreed that the canal should remain open to ships of all nations in peace and war.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Ottoman attack on the canal fails
description: During World War I, Ottoman forces attempted to strike the canal but were repelled by British-led defenders.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Nasser nationalizes the canal
description: Egypt’s president Gamal Abdel Nasser announced the nationalization of the Suez Canal Company.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Suez Crisis begins
description: Israel invaded Sinai and Britain and France intervened, triggering a major international crisis over the canal.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Canal reopens after the Suez Crisis
description: Following hostilities and clearance operations, commercial navigation resumed through the canal.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Canal closes after the Six-Day War
description: War between Egypt and Israel shut the canal and stranded ships in the Great Bitter Lake.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Suez Canal reopens after eight years
description: Egypt reopened the canal to navigation after extensive mine-clearing and reconstruction.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: New Suez Canal expansion opens
description: Egypt inaugurated a major expansion intended to increase capacity and reduce transit times.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Ever Given runs aground
description: The container ship Ever Given blocked the canal, disrupting a vital artery of world trade.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Suez Canal and Global Shipping
timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of the Suez Canal, from ancient canal precedents to modern global shipping crises.
title: Ever Given is refloated
description: Salvage teams freed the ship and allowed traffic to resume, though delays continued for days.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Nimatron is exhibited at the New York World’s Fair
description: One of the earliest public electronic game machines introduced computer play to a mass audience.
source_publisher: The Strong National Museum of Play

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Cathode-Ray Tube Amusement Device is patented
description: The patent documented one of the earliest known interactive electronic game concepts.
source_publisher: The Strong National Museum of Play

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: OXO appears on the EDSAC computer
description: Alexander S. Douglas created a computerized noughts-and-crosses game often cited among the first video games.
source_publisher: The Strong National Museum of Play

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Tennis for Two is demonstrated
description: Physicist William Higinbotham built an oscilloscope-based game that became a famous early interactive display.
source_publisher: The Strong National Museum of Play

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Spacewar! is created at MIT
description: Spacewar! became a landmark multiplayer computer game and a model for future action games.
source_publisher: The Strong National Museum of Play

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Ralph Baer begins work on home television gaming
description: Baer’s experiments led to the “Brown Box,” a prototype for home video game consoles.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Computer Space reaches arcades
description: The first commercially sold arcade video game brought space combat to public venues.
source_publisher: The Strong National Museum of Play

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Magnavox Odyssey launches
description: The Odyssey became the first home video game console released to consumers.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Pong becomes an arcade hit
description: Atari’s Pong helped turn video games into a mass-market entertainment business.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Atari 2600 debuts
description: The Atari Video Computer System popularized interchangeable cartridges and home console gaming.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Pac-Man reshapes arcade culture
description: Namco’s Pac-Man became a global sensation and broadened the commercial appeal of arcades.
source_publisher: The Strong National Museum of Play

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Nintendo launches the Famicom
description: Nintendo’s Family Computer laid the foundation for the company’s later global console dominance.
source_publisher: The Strong National Museum of Play

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Video Games
timeline_description: Major milestones in the technological, commercial, and cultural history of video games from early experiments to the modern industry.
title: Tetris is created
description: Alexey Pajitnov’s puzzle game became one of the most influential and widely distributed games ever made.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Worcester v. Georgia affirms tribal sovereignty
description: The ruling held that Georgia law had no force within Cherokee territory, though enforcement failed politically.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Dred Scott v. Sandford deepens the slavery crisis
description: The Court ruled against Dred Scott and declared that Congress lacked power to ban slavery in the territories.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Congress fixes the Court at nine justices
description: The Judiciary Act of 1869 established the modern statutory size of the Supreme Court.
source_publisher: Supreme Court of the United States

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Plessy v. Ferguson upholds segregation
description: The Court endorsed the doctrine of “separate but equal,” legitimizing racial segregation for decades.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Court moves into its own building
description: The justices began sitting in the purpose-built Supreme Court Building in Washington.
source_publisher: Supreme Court of the United States

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Brown v. Board of Education overturns school segregation
description: The Court unanimously ruled that segregated public schools are inherently unequal.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Miranda v. Arizona requires police warnings
description: The Court required suspects in custody to be informed of key constitutional rights before interrogation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Roe v. Wade recognizes a constitutional abortion right
description: The Court held that a right to privacy protected a woman’s decision to terminate a pregnancy under certain conditions.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: United States v. Nixon limits executive privilege
description: The Court ordered President Nixon to turn over subpoenaed tapes during the Watergate scandal.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Bush v. Gore effectively settles the presidential election
description: The decision halted the Florida recount and effectively resolved the 2000 U.S. presidential contest.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Citizens United expands corporate political spending rights
description: The ruling struck down key campaign finance restrictions on independent political expenditures.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Obergefell v. Hodges legalizes same-sex marriage nationwide
description: The Court held that same-sex couples have a constitutional right to marry.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Supreme Court of the United States
timeline_description: Major milestones in the institutional history of the Supreme Court of the United States and in landmark decisions that reshaped constitutional law.
title: Dobbs v. Jackson overturns Roe v. Wade
description: The Court held that the Constitution does not confer a right to abortion, returning regulation to elected governments.
source_publisher: Supreme Court of the United States
